infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: WiamApp uses your camera to take your verification selfie and ID photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: WiamApp needs photo access to upload your portfolio and profile picture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: WiamApp saves photos to your library when needed.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: WiamApp uses your location to show nearby workers and for GPS job check-in.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: WiamApp uses your location to match you with nearby workers.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: WiamApp uses your microphone to send voice messages to workers and customers.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: WiamApp uses Face ID to keep your account secure.
